_meta.description: Per-HI-field reading + concise English label. Used by the viewer's side-table to render ruby (furigana) over kanji + an English column. Reading is the modern Japanese reading of the kanji term; en is a short paper-readable label. For longer historical context, see the per-annotation popups.
